market_brief.summary_en: Market regime is MIXED at 55.1/100 with SPY distribution days at 7 and QQQ at 6 both signaling DANGER.

key_themes_en: VIX at 16.84, 10Y yield at 4.49%, DXY at 101.50
SPY 7 distribution days DANGER, QQQ 6 days DANGER, market social sentiment optimistic at 1.3

market_brief.watch_points_en: Watch TSM premarket at $469.71 and NVDA premarket at $195.78 for opening direction signals.
market_brief.watch_points_ko: TSM 프리마켓 $469.71, NVDA 프리마켓 $195.78 주시 필요.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $477.57 with premarket at $469.71. All EMAs above price with GC and 52-week high nearby. Social discussion driven by analyst price target raises and AI demand strength.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM은 $477.57에 마감했으며 프리마켓은 $469.71이다. 모든 이평선 위 GC 위치에 52주 고점 근처다. 소셜 논의는 애널리스트 목표가 상향과 AI 수요 강세가 주도한다.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Entry near EMA21 $437.28 or breakout above $477.57.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA21 $437.28 근처 진입 또는 $477.57 돌파 기회.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $200.09 with premarket at $195.78. Trading below EMAs with EMA200 still rising and volume contraction noted. Social sentiment optimistic on AI infrastructure dominance and long-term growth outlook.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Further downside toward EMA50 $204.74 area if premarket weakness continues.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_ko: 프리마켓 약세 지속 시 EMA50 $204.74 영역 추가 하락 위험.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $563.29 with premarket at $597.01. Trading below EMAs in DOWNTREND structure with Stage2 at 2/7. Social discussion mixed on YTD underperformance offset by valuation views.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: META는 $563.29에 마감했으며 프리마켓은 $597.01이다. DOWNTREND 구조에 이평선 아래 Stage2 2/7 수준이다. 소셜 논의는 YTD 부진과 밸류에이션 상반된 의견 혼재.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Resistance near EMA50 $596.40 with broader DOWNTREND structure.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $420.60 with premarket at $419.09. Trading below EMAs in DOWNTREND with Stage2 5/7 and monthly uptrend confirmed. Separately, social discussion centers on Q2 delivery expectations and FSD regulatory progress.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Monitor GC retest near EMA21 $401.29 for potential stabilization.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $116.67 with premarket at $120.21. Trading below all EMAs in DISTRIBUTION structure with Stage2 at 0/7. Social sentiment optimistic on NATO Maven system full operational capability.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $1,154.29 with premarket at $1,083.86. All EMAs above with GC and 52-week high nearby in confirmed uptrend. Social discussion fueled by strong AI-driven HBM/DRAM demand and raised outlook.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Entry near EMA21 $1,039.45 or hold above $1,154.29.
